data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any checks or validations related to the specific requirement of 'Upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior'. While the linked use case mentions this behavior, there are no prior steps that demonstrate its implementation or validation, indicating a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for upgrade/downgrade behavior
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the upgrade/downgrade process correctly applies prorated charges.
